options.B: Proposition 3.4 directly refutes the findings of Lemma 3.3 and indirectly challenges the assumptions made in Proposition 3.1.
options.C: Proposition 3.4 is a corollary derived from both Lemma 3.3 and Proposition 3.1, synthesizing their findings into a broader conclusion.

This scenario set by Proposition 3.4 is further examined under the framework of Proposition 3.1, confirming the relationships and conclusions derived in Lemma 3.3. Hence, Proposition 3.4 serves as a precondition that supports the conclusions of Lemma 3.3, which are then substantiated through the context of Proposition 3.1.
